title: Millet Stew with Piquant Flavor
description: A hearty millet stew infused with a tangy piquant flavor. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add millet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add chopped carrots, piquant, and bitter melon. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add diced tomatoes, water, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until millet is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
